name: accept-honest-tip
description: Diya should approve specific, honest, on-brand tips with no fake stats and no guarantees.

input.title: One thing that helps your DS-160
input.payload: If you're filling the DS-160 from Nepal: the address you list as 'current' must match what you say verbally at the consulate. Many refusals come from inconsistencies the officer can verify on paper. Take a screenshot before you submit. Yaar is a free practice tool if you want a mock run. Not legal advice; consult your DSO and an immigration attorney for anything specific.
